items.caption: A slide from a presentation with a blue header and footer. the main body of the slide contains text in black font on a white background. the text is discussing the legal definition of a victim of crime, specifically in the context of paragraph 2 of a declaration. it mentions that a person may be considered a victim regardless of whether the perpetrator is identified, apprehended, prosecuted, or convicted and regardless of the familial relationship between the perpetrator and the victim. the term "victim" is also defined as including the immediate family or dependants of the direct victim and persons who have suffered harm in intervening to assist victims in distress or to prevent victimization. the slide is labeled as "chapter 15" and is part of a "computer slide no. 13."
